meaning: adj.杀人狂adv.狂乱地,杀气腾腾地
examples: A soldier was arrested after running amok with a vehicle through Berlin.
Koch Industries was the poster child of a company run amok.
Does the same biology that leads cancer cells to run amok also cause us to age?
The concept that stem cells run-amok may fuel cancer's spread was first proposed in the 1960s.
